title: Daily Briefing Generator - Briefings
description: Daily briefing records generated by the Daily Briefing Generator pipeline. Created by the briefing-lead agent on first run. Each row represents one daily briefing with summary statistics and source availability.

Date.description: Briefing date in YYYY-MM-DD format — primary lookup key and page title.

Briefing.description: Link to the full briefing Notion page. The actual briefing content lives in a separate page; this field stores the page URL for quick access.

Meeting Count.description: Number of calendar events scheduled for the day.

Email Count.description: Number of priority unread emails included in the briefing.

Task Count.description: Number of tasks due today (includes overdue items).

Overdue Tasks.description: Number of overdue tasks flagged in the briefing.

Sources Used.description: Which data sources successfully contributed to this briefing.

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the briefing was generated.

notes: The briefing-lead agent searches for this database by name ('Daily Briefing Generator - Briefings') before creating it. Lazy-created on first pipeline run. One row per day — duplicate dates are overwritten with the latest briefing.
